title: Vintage Inspired Orange Juice Vase, The Original Rise and Shine Decorative Ceramic Vase, OJ Carton, Retro Unique Eclectic Novelty Accent for Home/Kitchen/Office, Orange Juice (Orange Vase)
features: ORIGINAL: Meet the original orange juice vase; Featuring a vintage inspired design by the one and only artist Dustin Williams that wraps around all four sides, this novelty decor piece is sure to bring a touch of sunshine to your space.

USES: Made for flowers and trinkets but NOT suitable for human consumption or use in the microwave; use this classic vase for bathroom decor, to hold flowers, or a centerpiece in your kitchen (but not as a drink pitcher!).

VIBRANT: Rise and shine, this sunny vase will add a pop of color and vintage flair to any space. Style it in your kitchen, bathroom, bedroom, dorm room, office or any other space you want to add a juicy and fun decor find.

SIZE: This coated ceramic vase is carton shaped and measures 9.75 inches (25 cm) tall x 2.75 inches (7 cm) wide so there’s plenty of room for water, flowers, office supplies, paint brushes, or anything else you want to display in a fun retro way; It weighs 1.68 pounds and has a 1.75” (4.44 cm) opening and vibrant printing on all 4 sides.
PACKAGING: Safe travels, our retro juice carton inspired vase is securely packaged in a printed box with styrofoam so your new home decor treasure has a safe journey to its new home!
